## Making a tuple (Spring 2025)

```{#lst-ex-bmi .python filename="code/2025/ex_5_1_tuples.py" code-line-numbers="false" line-height=0.5}
{{< include ../code/2025/ex_5_1_tuples.py >}}
```

## String chemistry (Spring 2025)

```{#lst-ex-bmi .python filename="code/2025/ex_5_2_string_chemistry.py" code-line-numbers="false" line-height=0.5}
{{< include ../code/2025/ex_5_2_string_chemistry >}}
```

## Yoda-talk (Spring 2025)

```{#lst-ex-bmi .python filename="code/2025/ex_5_3_yoda_talk.py" code-line-numbers="false" line-height=0.5}
{{< include ../code/2025/ex_5_3_yoda_talk.py >}}
```
